title: Enhancing compliance and consistency: EDPB adopts DPIA template
summary: Brussels, 14 April – In line with the EDPB’s Helsinki Statement to make GDPR compliance easier and strengthen consistency across Europe, the EDPB has adopted a template for Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIA) via written procedure. The template will help organisations structure, harmonise and...
